title: OP Items
description: Adds a couple of somewhat powerful and useful items obtainable in survival to your world. More updates coming. Only in NeoForge 1.21.8
body:
This mod adds somewhat useful and powerful items to the game. So far I have added;
The Feather of Flight, which grants you flight for 10 seconds,
Super Food, which fills your entire hunger bar in one bite,
The Smelter Pickaxe, which smelts all the ores you mine,
The OP Potion, which gives you many good effects,
the Flame Sword, which does more damage than a diamond sword but less than a netherite sword, and comes with Fire Aspect II when crafted, 
the Infinity Pearl which is an ender pearl that doesn't run out, 
a Hammer, that mines in a 3x3 area,
and an Immortality Gem, which makes you immune to all damage (except for /kill and/or /damage commands) for 20 seconds.

Support me on Patreon at; https://patreon.com/Spaceboy11411

# Email me at **spaceb11411@gmail.com** for questions, suggestions or concerns.
